pr.title: Orchestrated 10L Int5 record stack, LeakyReLU² toggle, RunPod helpers

output.summary: Stacks a 10L mixed int5/int6 trainer with SmearGate, BigramHash, Muon+WD+SWA, sliding eval defaults, and optional LeakyReLU² toggle plus run helpers.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Includes full training plus validation evaluation; not a validation-only regimen.
techniques: Mixed int5 MLP + int6 attention quantization
Muon+WD optimizer with SWA and sliding-window eval defaults
Optional LeakyReLU² toggle plus orchestration/run helpers
